title: 2019: After the Fall of New York
original_title: 2019 - Dopo la caduta di New York
overview: After a nuclear war society breaks down into two groups, the evil Euraks, and the rebel Federation. A mercenary named Parsifal is hired by the Federation to infiltrate New York City, which is controlled by the Euraks, to rescue the only fertile woman left on Earth.
